svg.title: Belgian transport pipeline architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end data pipeline from iRail API through Kafka, ADLS, PySpark, dbt, to Streamlit dashboard, with Terraform and GitHub Actions as cross-cutting infrastructure.
svg.text: Built with: Python · Kafka · PySpark · dbt · Airflow · Terraform · Docker · GitHub Actions
Data: real-time SNCB/NMBS Belgian railway departures from 5 major stations
